text.intro: Geneva has produced bankers, diplomats, watchmakers of genius. It was time it produced a great wine. That is the Domaine Simone project: a wine built for excellence, rooted in an exceptional terroir cultivated with a single ambition: to rival the greatest references in the world.
text.outro: A terroir built for excellence, in the image of the estate's wines.

slope.text:
Slopes of 30 to 40% discipline the vine, encourage deep rooting and induce a controlled water stress, a vector of concentration and complexity.



Facing due West, these plots generously embrace the late afternoon sun, conducive to a slow and complete phenolic ripeness. Half of our vines are old vines, whose deep roots draw patiently from the depths of the terroir, offering a substance of rare intensity and natural complexity that only time can build.

soil.text: Registered in the AOC Premier Cru Côtes de Russin, our plots rest on generously stony clay-silt soils, a legacy of the great glacial migrations of the Quaternary and the Tertiary molasse. A balanced terroir, where the fine retention of silts dialogues with the natural drainage of the stones.

domain.title: Geneva is not a detail. It is the subject.
